title: ariocarpus fissuratus subsp. hintonii
intro: Ariocarpus fissuratus subsp. hintonii, also known as Hinton's Living Rock or Hinton's Ariocarpus, is a species of cactus in the genus Ariocarpus, native to Mexico. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its extracts exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in the management of conditions such as fever, skin infections, and digestive issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and can be used in the form of tinctures, capsules, or topical creams.
